creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
No, I don't have installed the flashplugin. The only plugin I had
installed (beside the default available plugins) was Firebug. And this
was at v1.5 and could not be updated because of the Firefox issue with
https connections.

So right now I removed the Firebug plugin, and now Firefox is working
without issues. But the processes are still there, even when I close
Firefox. The only difference is, that Firefox doesn't say anything
after I closed it and start it again.

But because of the processes are still there after closing, this PR can
not be closed.

Regards,
Hardy
-- 
Sicherer, schneller und einfacher. Die aktuellen Internet-Browser -
jetzt kostenlos herunterladen! http://portal.gmx.net/de/go/atbrowser
